  \(\mathtt{unitOverIso}\) supply the comparison of the restriction functors and of the
  unit. Concretely, \(\mathtt{sliceDualTransport}\) is the \emph{per-open localization to
  \(V\)} of \(\mathtt{overEquivalence}\,U\): localizing that equivalence at the open
  \(V \subseteq U\) produces exactly the reduced \(\mathcal{O}_Y(V)\)-linear equivalence
  \[

  \(\mathtt{unitOverIso}\) localized to \(V\), composed with the canonical bridge from the
